items.name: Galea Aurea
items.description: Legend tells of a golden helmet that belonged to a demon king, whose greed led to a curse. The curse brought a touch that turned everything to gold, trapping the king in his own armor in that very moment. Centuries later, the helmet remains, coveted by those brave enough to wear it and risk its cursed touch.
